steps.t: Crithon has asked you to drive away badgers around the river Erui south-west of Imloth Melui.
The badger problem has been addressed. You should report your progress to Crithon. Crithon is in Imloth Melui.
Crithon has asked you to deliver your report to Arlach. Arlach can be found in Arnach.
